heroHeadline: Lebanon Navigates Post-War Reconstruction Under New Government
heroSubtitle: From Phoenician city-states to November 2024 ceasefire: President Aoun and PM Salam chart a path forward as Hezbollah weakens, economy struggles, and international community conditionally re-engages
footerNote: Data sourced from UN UNIFIL, World Bank, IMF, Special Tribunal for Lebanon, HRW, Amnesty International, L'Orient Le Jour, Reuters, Al Jazeera, and scholarly consensus from UNESCO, Oxford, and Cambridge. Ancient history based on archaeological and textual evidence with noted uncertainties.
